hypothesis: If STR-Bamba426M is pretrained as a hybrid Transformer/Mamba-2 encoder-decoder using a custom seven-representation BPE tokenizer on diverse molecular, polymer, and electrolyte corpora, then it will learn aligned latent embeddings that produce clearer modality- and chemistry-aware clustering, improved downstream molecular property prediction, and more accurate inter-representation translation because multimodal pretraining and shared tokenization enforce semantic alignment across molecular representations.
